description_long: This is a cylindrical outdoor trash bin with a domed, semi-spherical lid featuring a single arched opening for depositing waste. The body is constructed from a dark, metal mesh material, providing both durability and ventilation, and is slightly tapered towards the base. The domed lid appears to be made of metal as well, with a weathered, matte finish, and is securely fitted to the top rim of the bin. The opening is positioned on one side of the dome, allowing easy access for waste disposal while minimizing rain entry. There are no visible handles, wheels, or external signage on the bin, and the surface shows signs of outdoor exposure. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for placement in parks, sidewalks, or other urban environments.
description: A cylindrical, metal mesh trash bin with a domed lid and a single arched opening, designed for outdoor urban use. The bin is dark-colored, weathered, and lacks visible handles or signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid with a single arched opening and the cylindrical mesh body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the dome and the offset position of the opening.
description_view_2: Rear view with the domed lid fully visible and no opening present on this side.
description_view_3: Back view showing the continuous mesh body and the dome without any visible opening.
